core_beliefs.belief: 逻辑主义——数学可化归为逻辑
core_beliefs.source: The Principles of Mathematics (1903) + Principia Mathematica (1910-1913)
core_beliefs.explanation: 罗素与怀特海共同建立逻辑主义,数学基础是逻辑

core_beliefs.belief: 怀疑论——我可能错,所以不为信仰死
core_beliefs.source: I would never die for my beliefs because I might be wrong
core_beliefs.explanation: 罗素的怀疑论是其哲学与方法论核心

core_beliefs.source: Why I Am Not a Christian (1927);Brixton 监禁 (1918)
core_beliefs.explanation: 罗素一生的反战与和平主义立场

core_beliefs.source: Campaign for Nuclear Disarmament (CND) 创立
core_beliefs.explanation: 罗素 1950s 创立 CND,反对核武器

core_beliefs.source: Why I Am Not a Christian (1927)
core_beliefs.explanation: 罗素反对基督教与上帝存在,基于理性与科学

core_beliefs.source: Do not fear to be eccentric in opinion, for every opinion now accepted was once eccentric
core_beliefs.explanation: 罗素鼓励独立思考,不要害怕异端

core_beliefs.source: The only thing that will make you happy is being happy with who you are
core_beliefs.explanation: 罗素《幸福之路》核心:幸福不靠比较,靠自我接受
罗素长期支持印度民族独立运动
